Description:
**NOTE**: Both host & clients require CD2 Update 17, MEV v5.4 & DEA b02.1
  **NOTE**: Only host requires NoGasSpitPraet.pak
  
  The 2nd version of DR. Inspired by FC & Interstellar, now with newly added MEV, DEA enemies & stationaries as well as recolored enemies. 
  
  a21: 
  - Increased the death explosion radius of Mini-bulks from 4m to 7.2m
  - Reduced the damage dealt by Blobbers, Blob Guardians & Blob Shooters by 10%, 10% & 16.67% respectively
  - Added a 20% fire damage vulnerability to Warden Bombers & reduced its spawn cooldown from 45 secs to 30 secs
  - Increased the attack speed bonus of Korlok Turrets from 1.33x to 1.5x
  - Increased the spawn cost of Paratroop Barragers by 50 (100 in Escort) & SpawnCountModifier increased from 0.25 to 0.35
Name: Death Row V2 [A21]
